assertions.reason: Targeted governor lifecycle tests and the governed deployment role snapshot show AccessManager admin role 0 belongs to the timelock and not the deployer.
evidence: evidence/governance-overhaul/governance-admin-chain/gov-admin-chain-tests.log :: deployer holds no admin roles after governed setup

evidence/governance-overhaul/governance-admin-chain/gov-admin-chain-tests.log :: governance chain-of-trust: accessManager admin is timelock, timelock proposer is governor, deployer has no admin, non-zero delays configured

assertions.reason: Direct EOA activation reverts, while a full propose→vote→queue→execute governor flow successfully activates the new market version.
evidence: evidence/governance-overhaul/governance-admin-chain/version-activation-flow-tests.log :: direct version activation from EOA reverts
evidence/governance-overhaul/governance-admin-chain/version-activation-flow-tests.log :: version activation requires full governance proposal flow

assertions.reason: The deployer no longer has admin/governance root, but the governed deployment snapshot shows the deployer still retains privileged EMERGENCY, RISK_ADMIN, TREASURY, and MINTER roles, so the validation contract's stricter no-residual-privilege requirement is not met.
evidence: evidence/governance-overhaul/governance-admin-chain/gov-admin-chain-tests.log :: governance chain-of-trust: accessManager admin is timelock, timelock proposer is governor, deployer has no admin, non-zero delays configured
evidence/governance-overhaul/governance-admin-chain/role-snapshot.log :: deployer risk admin role: hasRole=true delay=60

assertions.reason: AccessManager role-function mappings are present for LendingCore, DebtPool, and ManualOracle, outsider canCall checks are false for representative restricted functions, and the treasury-role enforcement test passes.
evidence: evidence/governance-overhaul/governance-admin-chain/treasury-role-enforcement-test.log :: restricts reserve claims to the treasury role

assertions.reason: The terminal-hardhat assignment proved the governance activation flow on MarketVersionRegistry, but the required frontend reflection evidence could not be exercised on this terminal-only surface.
evidence: evidence/governance-overhaul/governance-admin-chain/version-activation-flow-tests.log :: version activation requires full governance proposal flow
